authors.author: Paul Jannuzzelli
Paul Jannuzzelli
Herr, ich lieb dich so sehr

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v3 v1 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear this praises from a grateful heart Each time I think of You, the praises start Love You so much, Jesus Love You so much

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, I love You, my soul sings In Your presence, carried on Your wings Love You so much, Jesus Love You so much

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How my soul longs for You Longs to worship You forever In Your power and majesty Lift my hands, lift my heart Lift my voice towards the heavens For You are my sun and shield

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love You so much, Jesus Love You so much.
